name: System Time Discovery via Command-Line Tools
description: Detection of command-line tools or PowerShell commands used to query system date, time, or time zone settings, indicating potential adversary reconnaissance.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The hostname where the command was executed.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account that executed the command.

parameters.name: ProcessName
parameters.description: The name of the process that executed the command (e.g., net.exe, powershell.exe).

parameters.name: ParentProcessName
parameters.description: The name of the parent process that launched the command.

parameters.name: ParentCommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line of the parent process.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Event ID of the process creation (e.g., 1 for Sysmon, 4688 for Windows Security).

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.description: The name of the Sysmon rule that triggered the event, if applicable.
